instance PhysicalSystemDataSource : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Data sources originate from the physical system via a one-way digital shadow data flow"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhysicalSystemDataTransmitted
]

    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalSystemDataSource
]

    base:desc "Contextual data traces aggregated and abstracted for specific purposes"

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler, SimulinkEnabler, CppEnabler, JavaEnabler
]
